scripts.prebuild: npm run prisma:generate && npm run prisma:migrate:deploy
scripts.prisma:migrate:deploy: node -e "if(process.env.PRISMA_MIGRATE_DEPLOY==='true'){require('child_process').execSync('npx prisma migrate deploy',{stdio:'inherit'})}else{console.log('Skipping prisma migrate deploy (set PRISMA_MIGRATE_DEPLOY=true to enable)')}"
